description: Knowledge base operations monitoring: connector syncs, ingestion, embeddings, query volume, and reranker performance

options.content:
# Knowledge Base Operations

Monitor connector syncs, document ingestion, embedding batches, query traffic, and reranker performance. Use the variables above to filter by connector type or search type.

panels.description: Total connector sync operations during the selected time range across all connector types and statuses
panels.title: Total Syncs

panels.description: Percentage of successful connector syncs during the selected time range
panels.title: Sync Success Rate

panels.description: Current number of active connector sync and batch embedding tasks. This is task-level progress, not a document count.
panels.title: Tasks In Progress

panels.description: Documents counted when connector sync summaries are reported. This can lag behind chunk creation while syncs are still running.
panels.title: Documents Ingested (Completed Syncs)

panels.description: Total text chunks created during the selected time range
panels.title: Chunks Created

panels.description: Rate of connector sync operations broken down by connector type and status
panels.title: Sync Rate by Connector Type

panels.description: 95th percentile of connector sync duration, indicating how long the slowest syncs take
panels.title: Sync Duration (P95)

panels.description: Total embedding batch operations processed during the selected time range
panels.title: Total Embedding Batches

panels.description: Percentage of embedding batches that resulted in errors during the selected time range
panels.title: Embedding Error Rate

panels.description: Rate of embedding batch operations broken down by status (success, error)
panels.title: Embedding Batches by Status

panels.description: Rate of documents processed by the embedding pipeline broken down by status
panels.title: Documents Embedded by Status

panels.description: Latency of embedding API calls routed through the LLM proxy with source=knowledge:embedding
panels.title: KB Embedding API Latency

panels.description: Token usage rate for knowledge base embedding operations by token type (input, output)
panels.title: KB Embedding Token Usage

panels.description: Total RAG queries executed during the selected time range across all search types
panels.title: Total Queries

panels.description: Rate of RAG queries broken down by search type (semantic, keyword, hybrid)
panels.title: Query Rate by Search Type

panels.description: RAG query duration at P50, P95, and P99 percentiles
panels.title: Query Duration (P50, P95, P99)

panels.description: Distribution of result counts returned per RAG query at P50, P95, and P99 percentiles
panels.title: Results per Query

panels.description: Latency of reranker API calls routed through the LLM proxy with source=knowledge:reranker
panels.title: KB Reranker Duration

panels.description: Token usage rate for knowledge base reranker operations by token type (input, output), with zero fallback when no reranker token metrics are present
panels.title: KB Reranker Token Usage

title: Archestra / Knowledge Base Operations
